description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:10-alpine Docker image with a cache on ./node_modules. Define variables DOCS_FOLDER=api-docs and SPEC_TO_DISPLAY=my-project_specification_0.0.1.json. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs npm install swagger-ui-dist@3.22.1 in before_script, then executes mkdir public, cp -rp node_modules/swagger-ui-dist/* public, cp -rp $DOCS_FOLDER/* public, and sed -i "s#https://petstore\.swagger\.io/v2/swagger\.json#$SPEC_TO_DISPLAY#g" public/index.html. The job publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact and only runs on the master branch. Name the job pages and assign it to the deploy stage.
